lines.speaker: Agmundi
lines.text: Oh no, not another human... what do you want then?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, do you get humans here often?

lines.speaker: Agmundi
lines.text: Not that often, no, but sometimes.

lines.speaker: Agmundi
lines.text: Of course, since you people are too big for dwarven clothes, they typically don't stay very long.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why don't you make bigger clothes then?

lines.speaker: Agmundi
lines.text: What'd be the point? Besides, I don't make these clothes myself.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who makes these clothes then?

lines.speaker: Agmundi
lines.text: Oh, my sister, she lives in Keldagrim-East. Has a little stall on the other side of the Kelda.

lines.speaker: Agmundi
lines.text: If she only worked a little harder, like me, she wouldn't have to live in the sewers of the city. Shame really.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: The sewers? Your sister lives in the sewers?

lines.speaker: Agmundi
lines.text: Keldagrim-East, such a ghastly place. Not civil, polite and clean like we are in the West.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Uh-huh.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So do you have any quests for me?

lines.speaker: Agmundi
lines.text: Quests? Why would I have any quests?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, just anything to do would be fine.

lines.speaker: Agmundi
lines.text: No, not right now... maybe I'll have something for you to do later, but nothing at the moment.

lines.speaker: Agmundi
lines.text: I ehm... find myself in some slight trouble, human. I was wondering if you were busy?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you need help with, exactly?

lines.speaker: Agmundi
lines.text: I need some clothing equipment for my sister. But hurry up! I will need [2/3/4] [needles/thread/pieces of wool/balls of wool] before [10/15/20] minutes are up.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hmm, [X] [item] in [X] minutes, that sounds about alright.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm incredibly busy, yes.

lines.speaker: Agmundi
lines.text: Pfft, I'm sure you are!

sections.title: Getting a bar or ore item request

lines.speaker: Agmundi
lines.text: I ehm... find myself in some slight trouble, human. I was wondering if you were busy?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you need help with, exactly?

lines.speaker: Agmundi
lines.text: I'm in need of some raw supplies. Get me [X] [pieces of/bars of] [item] and be quick about it! I need them within the next [X] minutes!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hmm, [X] pieces of copper ore in [X] minutes, that sounds about alright.

sections.title: Talking to her before acquiring the item request

lines.speaker: Agmundi
lines.text: I'm still waiting for [X] [item]! Are you getting them or are you still looking for the way out of the palace?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've had enough of this lousy job!

lines.speaker: Agmundi
lines.text: That just goes to show you can't trust humans!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Actually, I'm still just looking for your [X] [item].

lines.speaker: Agmundi
lines.text: Hurry up then, I haven't got all day you know!

sections.title: Talking to her after failing to bring the request in time

lines.speaker: Agmundi
lines.text: Oh, I should have known not to assign a human anything more complex than tying together [his/her/their] shoelaces. You didn't get me my [X] [item], did you? The [X] minutes have run out.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, ehm... sorry about that.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Actually, yes, I do have your [X] [item] right here.

lines.speaker: Agmundi
lines.text: Can't you humans tell the time! You're too late!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Look, I've got you your [X] [item]!

lines.speaker: Agmundi
lines.text: I'm amazed at your level of competence!

lines.speaker: Agmundi
lines.text: Do you want me to pay you in gold or would you prefer me to tell you about some crafting secrets?

lines.speaker: Agmundi
lines.text: Do you want me to pay you in gold or would you prefer me to teach you a bit about how you can mine more efficiently?

lines.speaker: Agmundi
lines.text: Do you want me to pay you in gold or would you like me to show you some smithing tricks?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like the gold.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Please teach me that.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Show me the gold!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Enlighten me.
